ai_summary: AAA Technologies Limited has secured a work order worth Rs. 11.23 lakhs from National Informatics Centre Services Incorporated (NICSI) to provide Application Security Audit and Compliance Services for the Employees' Provident Fund Organisation (EPFO). This new engagement with a government entity strengthens the company's position in the cybersecurity audit sector. A potential red flag is the relatively low financial value of the contract, which, despite being disclosed as a "material event" under SEBI regulations, suggests either a very conservative definition of materiality by the company or a smaller overall scale of operations.
